title: Squishmallows, dentures, and an ‘I Heart Hot Dads’ bag: Uber has found thousands of items left in robotaxis
summary: Uber's robotaxi service has recovered thousands of items left behind by passengers, from everyday objects to unusual belongings like dentures and novelty bags. The situation highlights the practical challenge of managing lost property in autonomous vehicles. It reflects the real-world complexities of deploying autonomous transportation at scale.
content: Even in a future of robot taxis, someone still has to return the things passengers leave behind.

zh.title: 软糖娃娃、假牙和"我爱帅爸爸"包：Uber在机器人出租车中发现了数千件遗失物品
zh.summary: Uber的机器人出租车服务从乘客那里找回了数千件遗失物品，从日常用品到假牙和新奇包包等不寻常物品。这种情况凸显了在自动驾驶车辆中管理失物的实际挑战。它反映了大规模部署自动驾驶运输的现实复杂性。

title: Male bowerbirds hope to dazzle females with bright human-made items
summary: Male bowerbirds are incorporating bright human-made items into their courtship displays, adapting to environmental changes caused by human activity. The behavior demonstrates how wildlife rapidly evolves in response to anthropogenic pressures. The phenomenon reveals unexpected ways species respond to human pollution and waste.
content: "It’s a reminder of how human activity is changing the natural world in unanticipated ways.”

zh.title: 雄性园丁鸟希望用闪亮的人造物品使雌性眼花缭乱
zh.summary: 雄性园丁鸟将闪亮的人造物品纳入其求偶展示，适应人类活动引起的环境变化。这种行为展示了野生动物如何迅速进化以应对人为压力。这种现象揭示了物种应对人类污染和废物的意想不到的方式。

title: Microsoft plans Linux tools and an RTX Spark desktop for Windows developers
summary: Microsoft announced new development tools for Linux and introduced the RTX Spark desktop device for Windows developers at Build 2026. The announcements reflect Microsoft's strategy to expand developer tooling across multiple platforms. These initiatives support Microsoft's commitment to cross-platform development workflows.
content: One hardware announcement and several software highlights from Microsoft Build.

zh.title: 微软计划为Windows开发者推出Linux工具和RTX Spark桌面
zh.summary: 微软在Build 2026会议上宣布了Linux新开发工具，并为Windows开发者推出了RTX Spark桌面设备。这些公告反映了微软在多个平台上扩展开发者工具的战略。这些举措支持微软对跨平台开发工作流的承诺。

title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
summary: Cybersecurity startup Cyera is pursuing a $12 billion valuation in a $300 million funding round led by Evolution Equity Partners, commanding an 80x revenue multiple despite operating losses. The high valuation reflects strong venture capital confidence in the cybersecurity market's growth. It underscores investor appetite for security startups regardless of current profitability.
content: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

zh.title: Cyera尽管运营亏损，仍以80倍ARR倍数追求120亿美元估值
zh.summary: 网络安全初创公司Cyera在由Evolution Equity Partners领导的3亿美元融资轮中寻求120亿美元估值，尽管存在运营亏损但仍获得80倍收入倍数。这一高估值反映了风投对网络安全市场增长的强烈信心。它表明投资者对安全初创公司充满热情，不论其当前盈利状况如何。

title: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
summary: Sony announced God of War Laufey for PlayStation 5, shifting the franchise's protagonist from Kratos to his wife Faye/Laufey. The game introduces more aerobatic action and magic-based gameplay compared to Kratos' heavy combat style. The announcement signals a significant narrative and gameplay direction change for the franchise.
content:
Sony ended its big State of Play showcase with a major reveal: the next God of War. The new title is called God of War Laufey, and is once again developed by Sony's Santa Monica Studio. Currently, the game doesn't have a date, but it's coming to the PS5 whenever it does launch.
This time, instead of perpetually furious dad Kratos, players will take control of Faye / Laufey, as the title implies. That means that while the tone of the game seems somewhat similar to past God of War titles, the gameplay looks quite different, with much more aerobatic action punctuated by magic instead of Kratos' heavy violence. Also, there's a giant, six-legged …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《战神：劳菲》即将登陆PS5
zh.summary: 索尼宣布PlayStation 5版《战神：劳菲》，将系列主角从克拉托斯转变为其妻子费伊/劳菲。与克拉托斯沉重的战斗风格相比，该游戏引入了更多特技飞行动作和魔法系玩法。这一公告预示着该系列在叙事和游戏方向上的重大改变。

title: Remedy’s Control sequel launches in September
summary: Remedy Entertainment's Control Resonant sequel launches September 24, 2026, featuring Dylan Faden as the sole playable character exploring the Faden siblings' complicated past. The game will see Jesse, the original protagonist, shape the narrative without being playable. The sequel continues the supernatural thriller franchise exclusively on PlayStation 5.
content:
Control Resonant, the upcoming sequel to Remedy Entertainment's Control, will be released on September 24th, 2026, according to a trailer that premiered during Tuesday's PlayStation State of Play show.
The trailer also gave a preview of the game's story, which stars Dylan Faden, who was imprisoned for much of the first game. He will be the "sole playable character," Remedy's Mikael Kasurinen says in a blog post, but his sister Jesse, who was the protagonist of Control, also "shapes the path" in Resonant.
"In Resonant, we go further into the Fadens' complicated past. Their lives have been anything but easy, and the cost of what they carry i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Remedy《控制》续作将于9月上线
zh.summary: Remedy Entertainment的《控制：共鸣》续作将于2026年9月24日发布，迪伦·费登为唯一可玩角色，探索费登兄妹复杂的过往。原主角杰西将在不可操控的情况下推动叙事发展。这部续作继续该超自然惊悚系列，独家登陆PlayStation 5。

title: Here’s seven bloody minutes of Wolverine on the PS5
summary: Sony unveiled seven minutes of gameplay footage for Marvel's Wolverine, an Insomniac Games exclusive launching September 15, 2026, on PS5. The footage showcased brutal, weighty combat with graphic violence as Logan uses his claws against enemies. The gameplay reveal culminates the long-awaited project first announced in 2021.
content:
At its big State of Play show on Tuesday, Sony shared new look Marvel's Wolverine, the next big title from Insomniac Games that's launching exclusively on PS5 on September 15th. Dressed in the iconic yellow Wolverine outfit, Logan slunk around and stabbed his way through a bunch of enemies, using his blades to take them out. Combat looked weighty and satisfying - though the game is extremely bloody, with red flying everywhere as Logan fought his opponents. 
Wolverine has been a long time coming, with Sony and Insomniac initially announcing the game all the way back in 2021. At the time, details were scarce. But Sony finally showed off some  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PS5上金刚狼的七分钟血腥游戏画面
zh.summary: 索尼发布了漫威金刚狼的七分钟游戏画面，这是Insomniac Games独占作品，将于2026年9月15日在PS5上发售。画面展示了残暴、沉重的战斗和图形暴力，洛根用爪子对抗敌人。这个游戏揭示完成了这个期待已久的项目，首次在2021年宣布。

title: Microsoft's Project Solara is an Android OS designed for agents instead of apps
summary: Microsoft announced Project Solara, a new Android operating system designed to prioritize AI agents over traditional applications. The OS reflects Microsoft's strategic pivot toward agent-based computing as the next software interaction paradigm. The initiative represents Microsoft's bet that intelligent agents will become the dominant computing interface.
content: Microsoft missed the boat on apps, so get ready for agents.

zh.title: 微软的Project Solara是为代理而非应用程序设计的Android操作系统
zh.summary: 微软宣布了Project Solara，一个新的Android操作系统，旨在优先考虑AI代理而非传统应用程序。该操作系统反映了微软向基于代理的计算战略转向，作为下一个软件交互范式。该举措代表了微软的赌注，即智能代理将成为主导的计算界面。

title: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
summary: PlayStation State of Play on June 2, 2026, showcased over 60 minutes of announcements and gameplay reveals, featuring God of War Laufey, Control Resonant, Marvel's Wolverine, and numerous other titles. The event highlighted Sony's upcoming game lineup as the company addresses challenges with rising console prices and underperforming live-service games. Major reveals from studios worldwide demonstrated PlayStation's diverse portfolio strategy.
content:
While the majority of Summer Game Fest takes place over the weekend, Sony is getting a jump on things with its next State of Play showcase, which airs on June 2nd at 5PM ET. It’s coming at a pivotal time for the PlayStation brand: The PS5 keeps getting more expensive and Sony’s big bet on live-service games has largely fallen flat. A good showing at SGF won’t fix everything, but it could help show that PlayStation is on the right path moving forward.
For its part, Sony says its latest State of Play will feature “more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world.” The only confirmed part of the event’s lineup is Wolverine, from Spider-Man developer Insomniac, which is slated to launch in September. But given the length of the stream, there’ll be plenty more detailed. Maybe we’ll see the just-announced third expansion for The Witcher 3, or the long-awaited final installment of the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy, or some more of Intergalactic, the next big project from The Last of Us developer Naughty Dog. It’s also likely the event will provide some insight into the uncertain future of Marathon.
Whatever Sony shows, you can watch along on YouTube or Twitch, or follow along with the latest developments right here.
And for everything announced at the rest of Summer Game Fest, be sure to check out our event hub.


					
God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
			
Remedy’s Control sequel launches in September
			
Until Dawn gets a little sun.
			
Marathon season 2 kicks off.
			
Ace Combat 8 release date: October 2nd.
			
A different take on Silent Hill.
			
Onimusha: Way of the Sword launches in September — and a demo is launching today.
			
Arrakis on console.
			
Dino crisis.
			
The Tomb Raider reboot is getting a small delay.
			
Yokai-slaying fun.
			
Dave the Diver is getting a prequel game.
			
Rayman reimagined, revealed.
			
A little more Marvel.
			
Here’s seven bloody minutes of Wolverine on the PS5
			
Pla

zh.title: 2026年6月PlayStation State of Play：所有新闻和预告片
zh.summary: 2026年6月2日的PlayStation State of Play展示了超过60分钟的公告和游戏画面，包括战神劳菲、Control Resonant、漫威金刚狼和众多其他游戏。该活动突出了索尼即将推出的游戏阵容，因为该公司正在应对主机价格上升和实时服务游戏表现不佳的挑战。来自世界各地工作室的重大发布展示了PlayStation多样化的产品组合战略。

title: Cyberdecks are having a moment, rejecting big tech surveillance with style and substance
summary: DIY cyberdeck projects are surging in popularity as communities showcase custom-built portable computers with solar power, emulation, and privacy-focused design. The trend reflects growing consumer interest in alternative computing devices that reject centralized surveillance and corporate control. These handmade devices combine technical capability with aesthetic appeal for maker communities.
content: Over the last few months, these DIY hardware communities have exploded in popularity as people on social media show off their solar-powered game emulators, pocket-sized ereaders, and clamshell purse computers.

zh.title: Cyberdecks正当其时，以风格和实质拒绝大科技监控
zh.summary: DIY网络甲板项目越来越受欢迎，社区展示了具有太阳能、仿真和隐私保护设计的定制便携式计算机。这一趋势反映了消费者对拒绝集中监控和企业控制的替代计算设备日益增长的兴趣。这些手工制作的设备为制造者社区将技术能力与美学吸引力完美结合。

title: Amazon-owned Ring should pay Americans for scanning their faces, lawsuit says
summary: A lawsuit alleges that Amazon-owned Ring cameras scan and identify faces of guests and passersby using AI facial recognition without consent, seeking compensation for affected Americans. The legal action highlights privacy concerns surrounding widespread facial recognition in consumer security devices. The case underscores ongoing tension between home security convenience and facial privacy rights.
content: Lawsuit: Ring cameras scan guests and passersby and use AI to identify faces.

zh.title: 亚马逊旗下Ring应为扫描美国人脸部而赔偿，诉讼称
zh.summary: 一项诉讼声称亚马逊旗下Ring摄像头在未经同意的情况下使用人工智能面部识别来扫描和识别访客和路人的脸部，要求对受影响的美国人进行赔偿。这项法律诉讼突出了消费者安全设备中广泛使用面部识别带来的隐私问题。该案件强调了家庭安全便利与面部隐私权之间的持续矛盾。

title: I held the next-gen handheld
summary: The MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus handheld powered by Intel's new Arc G3 Extreme processor demonstrates significant leaps in portable gaming performance and battery life. Intel's 18A process breakthrough has revitalized its gaming hardware prospects after recent setbacks from CPU and graphics failures. The device confirms next-generation handhelds have finally delivered long-awaited performance improvements.
content:
The new MSI Claw with Intel Arc G3 Extreme. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

Intel couldn't catch a break. Layoffs. Shakedowns. Crashing CPUs torpedoing its reputation, sending desktop gamers fleeing to AMD. Apple and Qualcomm pushing Intel out of multiple flagship laptops. A gaming graphics card going MIA. But its Panther Lake laptop chip, the first on its all-important 18A process, turned out excellent - and a handheld version might make Intel the leader in portable gaming chips.
On Monday, I spent two hours with an MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus handheld atop Intel's new Arc G3 Extreme. I walked away thinking that next-gen handhelds have finally arrived. The true leap in performance and battery life we've been waiting for …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我拿到了下一代手持设备
zh.summary: 配备英特尔新Arc G3 Extreme处理器的MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus手持设备在便携式游戏性能和电池续航时间上实现了显著飞跃。英特尔18A工艺的突破在其最近因CPU和显卡故障而遭遇挫折后重振了其游戏硬件前景。该设备证实了下一代手持设备终于实现了长期期待的性能改进。

title: If I had a hammer... it might actually be a rhino tooth
summary: Archaeological evidence reveals Neanderthals used rhino teeth as specialized tools in their diverse toolkit, expanding understanding of their technological sophistication. The discovery demonstrates Neanderthals' resourcefulness in adapting environmental materials for specific purposes. The finding contributes to research showing Neanderthals possessed more advanced technical capabilities than previously believed.
content: Neanderthals had some wild stuff in their toolkits.

zh.title: 如果我有一把锤子...它可能实际上是一颗犀牛牙
zh.summary: 考古证据表明尼安德特人使用犀牛牙作为他们多样工具包中的专门工具，扩展了对他们技术复杂性的理解。这一发现表明尼安德特人在适应环境材料用于特定目的方面的资源丰富性。这一发现有助于研究表明尼安德特人拥有比以前认为的更先进的技术能力。

title: Microsoft Build 2026: The 7 biggest announcements
summary: Microsoft Build 2026 featured seven major announcements including the Surface RTX Spark Dev Box, a device for developers to run local AI models. CEO Satya Nadella highlighted new AI infrastructure and updates to Microsoft's in-house AI models across the product portfolio. The announcements reflect Microsoft's strategic focus on AI integration and developer tooling.
content:
Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders. As expected, it was filled with announcements, ranging from new Surface hardware to an always-on personal assistant and updates across Microsoft's in-house AI models.
If you didn't watch the event live, you can catch up on all the latest news in the roundup below.
A mini Surface PC designed for AI development
The Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is geared toward developers who want to run local AI models on their device, serving as a substitute for Qualcomm's canceled dev kit. It comes equipped with Nvidia's new Arm-based Spark RTX chip and 128G …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软Build 2026：7大重要公告
zh.summary: 微软Build 2026发布了七项重要公告，包括Surface RTX Spark Dev Box，这是一个供开发者运行本地AI模型的设备。首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉强调了新的AI基础设施和微软产品组合中内部AI模型的更新。这些公告反映了微软在AI集成和开发者工具方面的战略重点。

title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in four months
summary: Uber has capped employee AI spending after exhausting its budget in four months, despite previously encouraging unlimited AI use across the company.
content: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

zh.title: Uber在四个月内耗尽预算后限制员工AI支出
zh.summary: Uber在四个月内耗尽其AI预算后，对员工的AI支出进行了限制，尽管公司之前曾鼓励在整个公司范围内无限制地使用AI。

title: Feds failing in bid to take a supercomputer from a climate research center
summary: The National Center for Atmospheric Research successfully resisted federal attempts to seize its supercomputer, preserving critical computing infrastructure for climate research. The outcome protects the facility's ability to conduct atmospheric and climate research using the high-performance system. The case highlights ongoing disputes over resource allocation between federal agencies and research institutions.
content: The National Center for Atmospheric Research won't be losing its supercomputer.

zh.title: 联邦政府未能从气候研究中心夺取超级计算机
zh.summary: 国家大气研究中心成功抵抗了联邦政府试图扣押其超级计算机的企图，保护了气候研究的关键计算基础设施。这一结果保护了该机构使用高性能系统进行大气和气候研究的能力。该案例凸显了联邦机构和研究机构之间关于资源分配的持续纠纷。

title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
summary: Microsoft released an open-source framework called Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing that enables developers to create AI behavior evaluations using natural language descriptions.
content: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open-source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

zh.title: 微软新工具让开发者使用文本描述创建AI行为测试
zh.summary: 微软发布了一个名为"自适应规范驱动评分用于评估和回归测试"的开源框架，使开发者能够使用自然语言描述创建AI行为评估。

title: Trump signs executive order to review AI models before they’re released
summary: President Trump signed an executive order establishing a voluntary framework requiring AI companies to share frontier models with federal agencies before public release, aiming to balance innovation with national cybersecurity concerns.
content:
President Donald Trump signed an executive order Tuesday creating a "voluntary framework" for AI companies to share their frontier models with the federal government before they're released "to promote secure innovation and strengthen the cybersecurity of critical infrastructure."
The order says the US AI industry has succeeded in part "because we refuse to stifle this innovation with overly burdensome regulation," but that it also recognizes new AI capabilities come with security risks. Accordingly, it directs several federal agencies to come up with a framework to "assess the advanced cyber capabilities of AI models" before they're releas …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普签署行政令在AI模型发布前进行审查
zh.summary: 特朗普总统签署了一项行政令，建立了一个自愿框架，要求AI公司在公开发布前与联邦机构共享前沿模型，旨在平衡创新与国家网络安全关切。

title: A startup, Everand, is now bundling e-books, audiobooks, and book clubs in challenge to Amazon
summary: Everand launched a subscription service bundling e-books, audiobooks, and book club access to compete with Amazon's digital reading ecosystem.
content: A new reading subscription from Everand offers access to both e-books and audiobooks, and Fable's book club community.

zh.title: 初创公司Everand推出电子书、有声书和读书会打包服务挑战亚马逊
zh.summary: Everand推出了一项订阅服务，捆绑了电子书、有声书和读书会访问权限，以与亚马逊的数字阅读生态系统竞争。

title: Mathematicians warn of AI threats to profession as industry encroaches
summary: The International Mathematical Union has endorsed warnings about technology industry influence on mathematics as AI advances threaten traditional mathematical research and careers. The warning highlights growing tensions between academic and commercial mathematics.
content: International Mathematical Union endorses warning about tech industry influence.

zh.title: 数学家警告AI对数学专业的威胁，随着行业侵占
zh.summary: 国际数学联盟支持了关于技术产业对数学影响的警告，因为人工智能的进步威胁传统的数学研究和职业。这一警告强调了学术界和商业数学之间日益增长的紧张关系。

title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
summary: Martin Scorsese has adopted AI technology for storyboarding purposes, becoming an unexpected high-profile advocate for the tool in filmmaking.
content: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

zh.title: 马丁·斯科塞斯成为最新的——也是最不可能的——好莱坞人工智能倡导者
zh.summary: 马丁·斯科塞斯采用了人工智能技术进行故事板制作，成为电影制作中该工具出人意料的知名倡导者。

title: Microsoft’s next-gen quantum chip cuts timeline to useful quantum computing
summary: Microsoft announced Majorana 2, a next-generation quantum processor with qubits that are 1,000 times more reliable than its predecessor, advancing the timeline toward practical quantum computing applications.
content:
Microsoft’s new Majorana 2 quantum chip. | Image: Microsoft	

Microsoft claimed last year that it had made a key breakthrough in quantum computing with Majorana 1, the company's first quantum processor. While physicists were immediately skeptical of Microsoft's claims, the software giant is announcing Majorana 2 today, the next generation of its topological quantum chip.
Majorana 2 contains qubits, a unit of information in quantum computing much like the binary bits that computers use today, that are 1,000 times more reliable, according to Microsoft. It's a milestone that helps make quantum computing more reliable, thanks to the use of a new material stack and some help from Microsoft Discovery's agen …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软下一代量子芯片缩短了实用量子计算的时间表
zh.summary: 微软宣布推出Majorana 2，一款下一代量子处理器，其量子比特的可靠性比前代产品提高了1000倍，推进了实现实用量子计算应用的时间表。

title: Microsoft’s first advanced reasoning AI is here
summary: Microsoft unveiled MAI-Thinking-1, a flagship AI model developed entirely in-house that matches leading models on key software engineering benchmarks without relying on third-party model distillation.
content:
Microsoft announced a bunch of new in-house AI models at Build 2026, including a new "flagship" model: MAI-Thinking-1. It's an ambitious step into model development for Microsoft, which introduced its initial in-house models last year - before then, it had relied on OpenAI's models. The two companies recently renegotiated their deal to loosen ties.
According to Microsoft, MAI-Thinking-1 is a "medium-sized model" that "matches leading models" on "key" software engineering benchmarks. Microsoft says the company "trained it from the ground up on clean data, without distillation from third-party models." 
As for other models announced today, t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软首个高级推理AI发布
zh.summary: 微软推出了自主开发的旗舰AI模型MAI-Thinking-1，该模型在关键软件工程基准测试中与领先模型相匹配，无需依赖第三方模型蒸馏。

title: The durable, floatable UE Wonderboom 4 speaker is cheaper than ever
summary: The UE Wonderboom 4 waterproof Bluetooth speaker has reached its lowest price at around $51 (in blue), offering 14-hour battery life and IP67 water-resistance for portable audio.
content:
I like the UE Wonderboom 4 Bluetooth speaker so much that I bought two of them, though I wish I could have paid less for them. Fortunately, you can stock up on the cheap, so long as you like the color blue. The Wonderboom 4 is available in blue at Amazon for $51.49, and at Walmart and Best Buy for $51.99 ($28 off its regular price). That’s the lowest price we’ve seen yet for the waterproof speaker, with most of the other color options selling at a slightly higher (but still discounted) $69.99.
Ultimate Ears Wonderboom 4
The Wonderboom 4 might feature a compact design, but it still delivers big sound for its diminutive size. It also carries an IP67 rating, meaning it’s both water- and dust-resistant (it can even float if you need it to).

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $51.49 at Amazon
 $79.99 $51.99 at Walmart
 $79.99 $51.99 at Best Buy

Despite the Wonderboom 4’s compact size, the speaker sounds great, and is IP67-rated, meaning it can survive being submerged in water for a while. Although, its floatable design means that it’ll quickly return to the surface so you can put it back on dry land (it’s not meant to be listened to while in the water). If you have two of them, like me, they can be wirelessly paired together for stereo sound. With up to 14 hours of battery life per charge, the speaker will likely outlast your long summer outings. 
Other deals to consider
Hollow Knight: Silksong, the long-awaited sequel to Team Cherry’s 2017 metroidvania,  is discounted for the first time on the Nintendo eShop, bringing the price for the Switch and Switch 2 digital versions down to just $15.99 ($4 off). The difficult sequel pits players against relentless bosses and demanding platforming sections, and is great for anyone who loves a challenging side-scroller. Read our review.
This MAG 272QP 27-inch 1440p QD-OLED gaming monitor from MSI is marked down to $339.99 ($60 off) for Costco members, its lowest price yet. It’s selling for around $400 at other retailers, so this is a good dea

zh.title: 耐用且可浮水的UE Wonderboom 4音箱价格创新低
zh.summary: UE Wonderboom 4防水蓝牙音箱价格创历史新低，约为51美元（蓝色款），提供14小时续航和IP67防水等级，是便携音频的理想选择。

title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
summary: Microsoft launched Scout, a new AI personal assistant built on OpenClaw technology that integrates into Microsoft 365 applications like Outlook and Teams.
content: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

zh.title: 微软推出Scout个人助手，灵感来自OpenClaw
zh.summary: 微软推出了Scout，一款基于OpenClaw技术的新型AI个人助手，可集成到Outlook和Teams等Microsoft 365应用中。

title: Google announces deepfake call detection for Android, new AirDrop device support
summary: Google's June Android feature drop adds enhanced scam detection, expanded AirDrop device support across manufacturers, and new AI-powered security features.
content: Google's June Android feature drop includes more scam detection, more AirDrop, and yes, more AI.

zh.title: Google 宣布推出 Android 深度伪造通话检测和新的 AirDrop 设备支持
zh.summary: Google 的 6 月 Android 功能更新增加了增强的诈骗检测、跨制造商扩展的 AirDrop 设备支持以及新的 AI 驱动的安全功能。

title: Ex-Anduril engineer raises $42M to build the Amazon of composite parts
summary: Layup Parts co-founder Zack Eakin, drawing on motorsports experience and tenure under Palmer Luckey and Elon Musk, raised $42M to build a platform for faster and cheaper composite manufacturing.
content: Layup Parts co-founder Zack Eakin has drawn on a motorsports background, and his experience working for Palmer Luckey and Elon Musk, to tackle making faster, cheaper, and better composites.

zh.title: 前 Anduril 工程师筹集 4200 万美元打造复合材料领域的"亚马逊"

title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
summary: Google is deploying AI deepfake detection to the Phone app to protect users from scammers impersonating trusted contacts through spoofed numbers and synthetic audio.
content: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figures, family members, or employers.

zh.title: Google 推出虚假通话检测功能以防止 AI 深度伪造冒充诈骗

title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
summary: Microsoft is providing developers with a portable specification framework that lets teams define policies and compliance rules for AI agent behavior across deployments.
content: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

zh.title: 微软为开发者提供控制AI代理行为的更好方式

title: Microsoft Scout is a new AI personal assistant built on OpenClaw
summary: Microsoft Scout is an always-on personal assistant integrated into Microsoft 365 apps including Outlook, OneDrive, and Teams, capable of managing calendars, expense reports, and email drafting for employees.
content:
Much like Google, Microsoft is launching its own version of OpenClaw. Microsoft Scout is an always-on assistant that integrates into Microsoft 365 apps like Outlook, OneDrive, and Microsoft Teams, allowing businesses to assign a virtual assistant to employees to help with organizing calendars, expense reporting, email drafts, and much more.
Unlike Copilot that lives inside Microsoft 365 apps, Microsoft Scout can see and do a lot more. "This is a personal assistant, it's the first real personal assistant we've offered customers," explains Omar Shahine, corporate vice president of Microsoft Scout, in an interview with The Verge. "I think it's …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软Scout是基于OpenClaw构建的新型AI个人助手

title: Google’s Phone app will tell you if a scammer is impersonating one of your contacts
summary: Google's Phone app now identifies and flags suspicious calls spoofed to appear from saved contacts, protecting users from AI-based impersonation scams.
content:
Google is launching a new feature for its Phone app that aims to protect you from AI impersonation scams. Now, when you receive a call from a scammer that appears to be coming from the same number as one of your contacts, Phone by Google will flag the call as suspicious so you can hang up.
It's part of Google's broader June Android drop, which will add support for Apple AirDrop across more devices, including the Samsung Galaxy S25 lineup. Google is also making its Personal Safety app available to kids under 13, widely rolling out support for its AI-powered clothing try-on feature in Photos, and bringing the ability to find items in an outfi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌Phone应用将告知你骗子是否在冒充你的联系人
zh.summary: 谷歌Phone应用现在能够识别和标记伪装成已保存联系人的可疑来电，保护用户免受基于AI的冒充诈骗。

title: The truth lies in the past in Silo S3 trailer
summary: This article discusses the third season of the sci-fi drama Silo, with a focus on the show's themes of survival and uncertainty about when it will be safe for characters to leave their underground shelter.
content: "We do not know when it will be safe to go outside. We only know that day is not this day."

zh.title: 《Silo》第三季预告中，真相掩埋在过去
zh.summary: 本文讨论科幻剧《Silo》第三季，重点关注该剧关于生存主题，以及角色何时可以安全离开地下避难所的不确定性。

title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
summary: Amazon is facing a class action lawsuit in Seattle alleging that Ring's Familiar Faces facial-recognition feature stores images of passersby without their consent. The suit claims the technology violates privacy rights by collecting biometric data without authorization.
content: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

zh.title: 亚马逊因Ring面部识别功能面临集体诉讼
zh.summary: 亚马逊在西雅图面临一起集体诉讼，指控Ring的"面孔识别"面部识别功能未经同意存储行人图像。该诉讼声称该技术通过未经授权收集生物识别数据侵犯隐私权。

title: Number of suspected Ebola cases falls by hundreds as testing ramps up
summary: The number of suspected Ebola cases dropped significantly from 1,100 to 437 as expanded testing efforts provided clearer epidemiological data. The decline demonstrates how improved diagnostic capacity can reveal the true scope of outbreaks.
content: The number of cases falls from 1,100 to 437 with increased testing.

zh.title: 疑似埃博拉病例数大幅下降，检测工作加强
zh.summary: 随着检测工作扩展，疑似埃博拉病例数从1,100例显著下降至437例，提供了更清晰的流行病学数据。这一下降充分展示了改进的诊断能力如何能够揭示疫情的真实规模。

title: Focused Energy raises whopping $240M Series A for laser-powered fusion tech
summary: Fusion startup Focused Energy secured a $240 million Series A round to advance its laser-powered fusion technology toward commercial viability. The massive investment reflects growing investor confidence in alternative fusion approaches.
content: Another fusion startup has raised another a massive round to make this type of power a reality.

zh.title: Focused Energy融资2.4亿美元推进激光聚变技术
zh.summary: 聚变初创公司Focused Energy在A轮融资中获得2.4亿美元，用于推进其激光聚变技术走向商业化。这笔巨大投资反映了投资者对替代聚变方案日益增长的信心。

title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
summary: President Trump signed a revised AI executive order that weakens oversight requirements after industry lobbying, now requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced AI models. The narrower approach represents a significant retreat from stricter regulatory proposals.
content: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

zh.title: 特朗普签署更窄范围的AI监管行政令
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在行业游说后签署了修订版AI行政令，削弱了监管要求，现仅要求对先进AI模型进行自愿的发布前政府审查。这一更窄的做法代表了与更严格的监管提议相比的重大退步。

title: Why a Neo Geo port of Doom is functionally impossible
summary: A technical analysis explains why the Neo Geo's sprite-based graphics architecture cannot support first-person 3D games like Doom, despite the platform's technical capabilities in 2D rendering. The hardware's fundamental design creates insurmountable barriers for this genre.
content: Sprite-based graphics architecture makes first-person 3D a challenge.

zh.title: 为什么Neo Geo无法实现Doom的移植
zh.summary: 技术分析解释了为什么基于精灵图形的Neo Geo架构无法支持Doom这样的第一人称3D游戏，尽管该平台在2D渲染方面拥有强大的技术能力。硬件的基本设计为这一游戏类型造成了无法克服的障碍。

title: In a surprise launch, China debuts another big rocket designed for reusability
summary: China successfully launched another large reusable rocket using engineering principles similar to SpaceX's Falcon 9 approach, marking progress in developing domestic reusable launch capability. The move reflects competition in developing cost-effective space access technology.
content: There are sound engineering reasons to use the same approach SpaceX uses with the Falcon 9.

zh.title: 中国推出又一枚可重复使用的大型火箭
zh.summary: 中国成功发射了新款可重复使用大型火箭，采用了与SpaceX猎鹰9号相似的工程原理，标志着国内可重复使用发射能力的进展。这一举动反映了各国在开发成本高效太空进入技术方面的竞争。

title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
summary: OpenAI released six specialized Codex plug-ins targeting white-collar professions including data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Each tool bundles pre-configured integrations and instructions to help the AI approximate specific job functions.
content: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app, each of the new tools bundles integrations, instructions, and context to allow Codex to approximate a specific job.

zh.title: OpenAI发布白领工作专用的Codex工具
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了针对白领职业的六个专业化Codex插件，涵盖数据分析、创意制作、销售、产品设计、股权投资和投资银行等领域。每个工具都预配置了相关集成和说明，帮助AI执行特定的工作职能。

title: Board, the new game startup from Mirror founder Brynn Putnam, raises $20M, has already sold thousands
summary: Board, a 'together tech' startup founded by Mirror creator Brynn Putnam, raised $20 million in Series A funding and has already achieved thousands of sales. The company focuses on digital tools designed to facilitate in-person connection and collaboration.
content: Board, the startup building what it calls "together tech" designed to bring people into the same room, has closed a Series A led by Union Square Ventures.

zh.title: Board，来自Mirror创始人Brynn Putnam的新游戏创业公司融资2000万美元，已售出数千份

title: Password manager Dashlane says hackers stole some customers’ password vaults
summary: Password manager Dashlane disclosed that attackers brute-forced its two-factor authentication system to compromise customer accounts and download encrypted password vaults. The breach highlights vulnerabilities in security infrastructure at major password management services.
content: The password manager giant said hackers were able to "brute-force" its two-factor system, allowing them to access customer accounts and download their password vaults.

zh.title: 密码管理器Dashlane称黑客窃取了部分客户的密码库
zh.summary: 密码管理器Dashlane披露，攻击者通过暴力破解其双因素认证系统来入侵客户账户并下载加密的密码库。这次数据泄露凸显了主要密码管理服务的安全基础设施中的漏洞。

title: Blue Origin has set a very aggressive return-to-flight timeline
summary: Blue Origin announced an aggressive timeline to resume flight operations with critical infrastructure including propellant tanks, oxygen, liquid hydrogen, and LNG facilities in operational condition. The timeline signals the company's commitment to returning to active launch cadence.
content: "The propellant farm, oxygen, liquid hydrogen, and LNG tanks are all in good shape."

zh.title: 蓝色起源设定了非常激进的复飞时间表
zh.summary: 蓝色起源宣布了恢复飞行运营的激进时间表，关键基础设施包括推进剂储罐、氧气、液氢和液化天然气设施处于可运营状态。这个时间表表明了该公司对恢复活跃发射节奏的承诺。

title: Why VivaTech 2026 is the place to see Europe’s AI strategy take shape
summary: TechCrunch is partnering with VivaTech 2026 in Paris to cover pivotal conversations shaping Europe's AI strategy and the future of artificial intelligence. The event runs June 17-20 and will feature discussions on AI's role in European technology development.
content: TechCrunch is partnering with VivaTech 2026 to spotlight some of the most important conversations shaping the future of artificial intelligence. Join us in Paris June 17-20!

zh.title: VivaTech 2026为什么是观看欧洲AI战略成形的地方
zh.summary: TechCrunch正与巴黎的VivaTech 2026合作，报道塑造欧洲AI战略和人工智能未来的关键对话。该活动将于6月17日至20日举行，将包括关于AI在欧洲技术发展中的作用的讨论。

title: Meta tests ‘Series’ for episodic Reels on Instagram and Facebook
summary: Meta is testing a new episodic content format called 'Series' for Reels on Instagram and Facebook, and is exploring monetization opportunities for the feature. The company is expanding its short-form video capabilities beyond standalone Reels.
content: Meta told TechCrunch that it's considering ways to monetize the new feature, but didn't share specifics on what that could look like.

zh.title: Meta在Instagram和Facebook上测试"Series"故事剧集式Reels
zh.summary: Meta正在Instagram和Facebook上测试一种名为"Series"的新剧集式内容格式，并在探索该功能的货币化机会。该公司正在扩展其短视频功能，超越独立的Reels。

title: Slate Auto gets serious about privacy for its bare-bones EV pickup
summary: Slate Auto's EV pickup truck prioritizes user privacy by eliminating embedded modems and connected car features common in modern vehicles. The design stands out as a rare example of automotive technology rejecting always-connected functionality.
content: With no embedded modem, the Slate Truck is the antithesis of today's connected cars.

zh.title: Slate Auto对其极简EV皮卡采取隐私保护措施
zh.summary: Slate Auto的EV皮卡通过消除现代车辆中常见的嵌入式调制解调器和联网汽车功能来优先保护用户隐私。该设计是汽车技术拒绝始终连接功能的罕见例子。

title: Trump's DOE restarts energy rebate program with dumb conditions
summary: The Trump administration restarted a green energy rebate program but narrowed its scope by excluding electrification of home heating systems from fossil fuels.
content: Switching from fossil fuels to electricity for heating is no longer covered.

zh.title: 特朗普能源部以受限条件重启能源补贴计划
zh.summary: 特朗普政府重启了绿色能源补贴计划，但通过排除化石燃料家庭供暖系统电气化而缩小了范围。

title: Thermacell’s latest smart mosquito system is bigger and more expensive
summary: Thermacell has released Liv 2.0, an upgraded Wi-Fi-connected mosquito protection system with larger coverage and ability to deter no-see-ums, but at a significantly higher price starting at $1,746 and requiring professional installation.
content:
Liv 2.0 is the next generation of Thermacell’s Wi-Fi-connected mosquito protection system. | Image: Thermacell	

Thermacell has launched Liv 2.0, the next generation of its Wi-Fi-connected smart mosquito protection system. It features new hardware and can cover a larger area, and Thermacell says its formula can now deter no-see-ums. But it's also more expensive and requires professional installation. 
Liv 2.0 uses the same setup as the original Liv - a central hub with a wired repeller system containing its metofluthrin-based repellent - but it features entirely new hardware. Pricing starts at about $1,746 for a system with three repellers, a six-pack of repellent refills, and coverage of up to 900 square feet. That's twice as much as the original, wh …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Thermacell最新智能蚊虫系统更大且更昂贵
zh.summary: Thermacell推出了升级版Liv 2.0，这是一个Wi-Fi连接的蚊虫防护系统，覆盖范围更大，能够驱除蚋虫，但价格明显更高，起价为1,746美元，需要专业安装。

title: Amazon’s four-day Prime Day begins on June 23rd
summary: Amazon has moved Prime Day 2026 to June 23-27, offering member-exclusive deals and early discounts on tech products like Kindle and Echo, with shoppers also able to compare deals at competing retailers.
content:
Amazon bucked its usual tradition of having Prime Day in July. Prime Day 2026 is happening in June, kicking off in just a few weeks. Prime members will get access to many deals starting June 23rd at 3:01AM ET through June 27th at 3:01AM ET.
As with Amazon’s previous events, you don’t need to be a Prime member to buy products during Prime Day, but there will likely be member-exclusive sales. Moreover, you’ll get fast shipping on purchases, access to Prime Video, plus other member benefits (like a few $5 pizzas and early access tickets to the new Spider-Man movie).
The company has launched some early deals on its own tech products, including eero, Kindle, Echo, and other gadgets. We anticipate a lot more early deals to come over the next couple weeks leading into the event, and we’ll be sharing the best ones with you soon. We’ll also be highlighting deals happening at competing retailers, like Best Buy, Walmart, and more.
An easy way to keep up with the latest deals you shouldn’t miss is by visiting The Verge, of course. We have some other free, convenient methods for those who prefer to catch up over email. Our Verge Shopping dispatch launches a few times each week, and serves as a roundup for good deals, as well as recent reviews and guides. You can sign up below. We’re also debuting Verge Shopping Deal Alerts, a daily newsletter that contains a deal we think is too good to miss (and might be sold out before you know it). It’s like breaking news, but for deals.
It’s going to be a busy month full of deals (and developer conferences), so stay tuned for more.

zh.title: 亚马逊四天Prime Day从6月23日开始
zh.summary: 亚马逊将2026年Prime Day改期至6月23-27日，为会员提供专属优惠和Kindle与Echo等科技产品的提前折扣，购物者也可以比较竞争对手的交易。

title: Gemini Spark is the most impressive and terrifying AI experience I’ve had yet
summary: Google's new Gemini Spark is an agentic AI system that delivers more detailed and personalized results compared to previous AI chatbots, particularly excelling at complex trip-planning scenarios beyond generic suggestions.
content:
Spark is Google’s new agentic answer for everything.	

According to every product demo from the last four years, planning a trip is a killer use case for AI. Just tell it where you're going, they all promise, and your chatbot / agent / other buzzword will exhaustively search travel options, read up on all the fun things to do, check all the local hotspots, and offer you a fully fledged itinerary. So far, I've found this to work only in the most generic ways: If you want to do the six most obvious things in any city on planet Earth, AI has you covered, but that's about as far as it goes. 
I had a very different experience using Spark, Google's new always-on AI agent. Spark is a hugely ambitious  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Gemini Spark是我迄今为止最印象深刻和最令人恐惧的AI体验
zh.summary: 谷歌新推出的Gemini Spark是一个代理AI系统，相比之前的AI聊天机器人提供更详细和个性化的结果，特别是在复杂的旅行规划场景中表现出色，超越了通用建议。

title: ZeroDrift raises $10 million to protect AI models from themselves
summary: ZeroDrift has raised $10 million for an AI compliance service that intercepts messages between AI models and end users to flag and replace any content that might violate compliance requirements.
content: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

zh.title: ZeroDrift融资1000万美元保护AI模型免受自身威胁
zh.summary: ZeroDrift融资1000万美元推出AI合规服务，该服务拦截AI模型与终端用户之间的消息，标记并替换可能违反合规要求的内容。

title: Impulse Space raises $500 million as orbital maneuvering race heats up
summary: Impulse Space raised $500M in funding as the orbital spacecraft maneuvering market accelerates with new commercial competitors.
content: "The market's going to continue to find exciting new things."

zh.title: Impulse Space 融资 5 亿美元，在轨机动竞赛升温
zh.summary: Impulse Space 融资 5 亿美元，在轨航天器机动市场因新商业竞争者的出现而加速发展。

title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
summary: Rocket engine startup Impulse Space raised $500 million, with leadership emphasizing that engineering physical systems still requires substantial human talent and expertise over AI solutions.
content: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.

zh.title: 火箭发动机初创公司Impulse融资5亿美元，优先雇佣人才而非AI

title: People are leaving a lot of weird stuff in their robotaxis
summary: Uber expanded its Lost and Found Index to include Waymo robotaxis for the first time, documenting quirky items left behind including a Beanie Baby, bowling ball, and dentures.
content:
A unicorn Beanie Baby. A 15-pound green bowling ball. A pair of dentures. 
These are just some of the items left behind in robotaxis in the past year, according to Uber's annual Lost and Found Index. For the first time, the company is expanding its annual of accounting of things forgotten in Uber vehicles to include self-driving cars because, for the first time, Uber has enough self-driving cars on its platform to matter. 
Uber doesn't deploy its own robotaxis, but in the last few years it's become a clearinghouse for driverless car companies that want access to Uber's millions of customers. Here in the US, that includes Waymo (in Austin a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 人们在无人出租车里留下了很多奇怪的东西
zh.summary: 优步首次将Waymo无人驾驶出租车纳入其失物招领索引，记录了乘客遗留的奇特物品，包括毛绒玩具、保龄球和假牙。

title: Pacific Fusion’s latest prototype packs 440 gigawatts into an 80-nanosecond burst
summary: Pacific Fusion's sub-scale prototype demonstrated 440 gigawatts of power output in an 80-nanosecond burst, a significant milestone that positions the company to move forward with its demonstration power plant.
content: Pacific Fusion's sub-scale prototype delivered enormous amounts of power in a flash, setting the company up for its demonstration power plant.

zh.title: 太平洋聚变公司最新原型机在80纳秒脉冲中输出440吉瓦
zh.summary: 太平洋聚变公司的亚规模原型机在80纳秒脉冲中展现了440吉瓦的功率输出，这是一个重要里程碑，使该公司能够推进其示范电厂的建设。

title: How to watch Microsoft’s Build 2026 conference
summary: Microsoft's Build 2026 developer conference is streaming free online today with a heavy focus on AI announcements, featuring CEO Satya Nadella's keynote at 12:30PM ET as the opening presentation.
content:
Build 2026 is looking to be another AI-heavy affair. | Image: Microsoft	

Microsoft is kicking off its yearly Build developer conference in San Francisco today, sandwiched between the recent Google I/O and Apple's upcoming WWDC event. While tickets to attend Build in person are sold out, the conference is being streamed for free online, with CEO Satya Nadella opening with a keynote at 12:30PM ET / 9:30AM PT.
A cursory glance at the featured speakers and virtual sessions suggests that Build will predominantly focus on AI, which isn't surprising given this is a developer event in 2026. The keynote description also says that Nadella and Microsoft leaders will be sharing "how Microsoft is creating new opportunity for …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何观看微软Build 2026大会
zh.summary: 微软Build 2026开发者大会今天在网上免费直播，重点关注AI相关公告，CEO萨蒂亚·纳德拉将在美东时间下午12:30进行主题演讲作为开场。
